title: Delivery, security, and v0.1 acceptance matrix
description: Finalize CDN/npm/local delivery docs and examples, security review for untrusted DSL/SVG output, acceptance matrix across product/model/syntax/views/engine specs, and release-ready examples.
triage_notes: Cut from 00/04 delivery modes, security, and minimal acceptance criteria. Completion: docs/examples demonstrate CDN/npm/local/custom-element usage; labels are escaped/sanitized; acceptance matrix maps every v0.1 criterion to pass/defer evidence.
